snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

snippet.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
snippet.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #seasonchallenges

snippet.title: तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat chaturthi | Sankashti Chaturthi Ki katha
snippet.description:
This Video shows two stories of Til Chauth vrat or . Til Chauth is also called Sankashti Chaturthi, Sakat Chauth, Sankat Chaturthi. Til Chauth vrat is observed on the Chaturthi of Krishna Paksha of Magh maas. Til Kutte is offered to Shri Ganesh Ji and Chauth Mata on the day of sakat choth.   Tilakuta is made by crushing sesame and jaggery together.
Women observe this fast for the longevity and success of their husband and son. This fast destroys all kinds of crises and provides happiness and prosperity.
On this day of Sakat chauth, women keep a fast for the whole day and worship Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata in the evening. On observing the moon at night, the fast is completed. Let's watch the  Til Chauth Vrat Katha and pray to lord ganesh and sakata mata.

तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat Chauth Katha
आज मैं आप सभी के समक्ष तिल चौथ अथवा  संकट चौथ व्रत की  दो कथाएं  प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। तिल चौथ का व्रत माघ मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी को किया जाता हैं| इस दिन श्री गणेश जी व चौथ माता  को तिल कुट्टे का भोग लगाया जाता हैं |  तिलकुटा  तिल और गुड़ को  एक साथ कूटकर बनाया जाता है।
यह व्रत स्त्रिया अपने पति व पुत्र की दीर्घायु और सफलता के लिए करती हैं |  यह व्रत सभी प्रकार के संकटों  का नाश करता है और सुख समृद्धि प्रदान करता है।
इस दिन स्त्रिया  पूरा दिन व्रत रख कर शाम को गणेश जी व चौथ माता का पूजन  पूजन  करती हैं।  रात को चन्द्रमा को अर्ध्य  देने  पर व्रत पूर्ण हो जाता है। आइए शुरू करते हैं तिल चौथ की पहली कथा...

#tilchauthvratkatha  #sankatChauthVratKatha #ganesh  #chauthmata

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh
Line production- Sankalp Vaid 
Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty 
Makeup- Shyam Shrilal Vishwakarma 
BTS  : Akash Singh,  Shubham Bandhal, & Sumit Fanse

Streaming on All Audio Platforms :

Apple Music – https://music.apple.com/in/album/what-can-i-do-single/1550885290 
Spotify – https://open.spotify.com/track/3iAe6EeL2sDubF42mCadsF 
Amazon Music – https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08V59VMR9?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08V4B4T32 
YouTube Music – https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=XG73UQhA9RQ&feature=share 
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama – https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn – https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.title: നാളെ മുതൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പിടിച്ചെടുക്കും ലൈസൻസ് റദ്ദാക്കും പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പ്
snippet.description:
നാളെ മുതൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പിടിച്ചെടുക്കും ലൈസൻസ് റദ്ദാക്കും പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പ് 
𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ  പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ  ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക👍.

#chrishalmedia

For more latest news and informative updates..

snippet.title: Budget 2021 HIGHLIGHTS - The key Take Away -  CNN News18
snippet.description:
Watch the key highlights of Budget 2021 presented by the FM Nirmala Sitharaman.

Budget 2021 Highlights:

Contingency Fund of India to be enhanced to Rs 30,000 cr.

Propose to discontinue loans to FCI. Have provided for support in budget.

15th Finance Commission reconfirming share of States at 41%.

National Research Foundation to be set up at Rs. 50,000 crores to strengthen the research ecosystem

Union Budget 2021 allows NRIs to operate OPCs in India

#CNNNews18 #Budget2021 #BudgetWithNews18 

Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presents the Union Budget 2021 in Parliament. Sitharaman has raised hopes, going into the Budget event, by stating that it will "be a Budget like never before."

Watch all the latest updates on Union Budget 2021 LIVE: FM Nirmala Sitharaman to present budget at 11 AM.

snippet.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

What was your favourite moment from #ATKMBKBFC? Let us know in the comments below 👇 

#HeroISL #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

snippet.title: Gajendra Verma | Mushkil Badi | Summary - Chapter 01
snippet.description:
Official Video of Gajendra Verma's - Mushkil Badi  from the Album "Summary" - Chapter 01

"Summary - A Musical Series" is a romantic tale. The story starts with the first song and ends with the fifth song. A musical series on the summary of love taking romance to a whole new level along with the most beloved pair essayed by singer Gajendra Verma and beautiful Manasi Moghe. 

Subscribe to the Gajendra Verma Channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances
http://bit.ly/SubscribeToGajendraVerma

Listen on:
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-iTunes
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Gaana
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Spotify
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Hungama
http://bit.ly/MushkilBadi-Raaga

See more official videos from Gajendra Verma here: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0KNk-Joi-NM&list=PLTGJmH_RBpkEI18DUASS-BUKBCCcI679u

Connect with Gajendra Verma:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iVermaGajendra
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ivermagajen...
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ivermagajendra

AUDIO CREDITS

Singer, Lyrics & Music: Gajendra Verma
Mastering: Navneeth Balachanderan

VIDEO CREDITS

Direction & Story By: Vikram Singh
Starring:  Gajendra Verma, Manasi Moghe, Ömür Orçun Alioğlu, Komeil Vaez
Dialogues: Aseem Ahmed Abbasee
Cinematographer: Suman Dutta       
Asst. Dir: Devender Dah     
Editor: Gagan Sharma

VFX Studio: LetsVFX 
Costume Stylist: Ankita Patel     
Line Production: Line Production Turkey        
Line Producer: Uluc Yemen Aslan 
Line Producer India: Bijal Sunil Majithiya       
Production Manager: Hazal Caglayan        
Drone Pilot : Oğuz Albayrak 
Drone Camera: Sinan kılıç
Production Team:  Erhan Caylak & Gizem Demir 
Production Asst: Riad Afandiyev    
Makeup: Tamay Esintimur          
Makeup Asst: Selin Arier 
Makeup (Posters): Anshu Gautam
PR Team: Shruti Dahibavkar & Harish Pednekar
Social Media: Jasmeet Kaur, Bhisham Soni
Agency: Qyuki Digital Media
Record Label: Virtual Planet Music
Virtual Planet Team: Akshay Jain, Krishna Kishore, Preet Bhullar, Mohit Rajyaguru, Sourabh Swami & Amit Kumar

LYRICS:

Tum, tum to bas tum ho tumhari koi baat aur hai….
Main khicha chala aata hun mujh pe na koi jor hai

Music…

Ho.. Tum, tum to bas tum ho tumhari koi baat aur hai….
Main khicha chala aata hu mujh pe na koi jor hai
Tujhe jahan se main chupa lun kahin
O tere sang ghar bana lun kahi
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...

Music…

Ye sham hasin hai lekin ye mujhe raas aati nahi
Jo tu door baithi hai kyun mere paas aati nahi
Ye sham hasin hai lekin ye mujhe raas aati nahi
Jo tu door baithi hai kyun mere paas aati nahi
Teri nazar se door ho jaun kahin
Is bheed mein na kho jaun kahin

Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...
Ab dil mera kahin lagta nahi
O tere bin hai mushkil badi...

Music…

For Live Shows Bookings & Business Enquiries: 
Prashant Chaudhary +919988989833

snippet.title: Master - Vaathi Coming Video | Thalapathy Vijay | Anirudh Ravichander | Lokesh Kanagaraj
snippet.description:
மாஸ்டர் - வாத்தி கம்மிங் | தளபதி விஜய் | அனிருத் ரவிச்சந்தர் | லோகேஷ் கனகராஜ்

Make way for the extraordinary #ThalapathyKuthu! Our #VaathiComing right here from #Thalapathy's #Master! Loaded with the ultra-catchy rhythms and the Thara-local slang , listen to this #Anirudh dance number on loop! 

Watch the official Tamil song video here !

Stream Master Songs Now - https://SMI.lnk.to/MasterAlbum

Song - Vaathi Coming
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander

Vijay, Vijay Sethupathi

snippet.title: AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : NAQAAB नक़ाब ( Official Video ) | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Kala Niketan Presenting "Naqaab नक़ाब ( Official Video )" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Naqaab song starring with Amit Saini Rohtakiya & Khusi. This superhit haryanvi song sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. penned by KP Kundu & Bintu Pabra also music given by GR Music. this video directed by Jeetu G. Music Label by Kala Niketan Entertainment.

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

   Tera Kangana Haye Sangana ,
   Asin Dil Tere Ton Mangana ,
   Sun Lae Goriye Ni ,
   Ho Tera Koka , De Mauka , 
   Tainu Dewange Na Dhokha ,
   Delhi Diye Chhoriye Ni ,
   Impress Fira Tainu Ni Main Karda , 
   Tere Agge Pichhe Laike Ghuman Gaddi Ni ,
   Rabb Ne Banaya Tenu Time Kadd Ke , 
   Saunh Lagge Kasar Koi Chhadi Nai ,
   Ho Tera Kharcha , Haaye Charcha , 
   Tere Te Pauna Parcha ,
   Dilan Diye Choriye Ni ,
   Tera Kangna Haaye Sangna , 
   Asi Dil Tere To Mangna ,
   Sun Le Goriye Ni ,
   Tera Koka , De Moka , 
   Tenu Dewange Na Dhokha ,
   Dilli Diye Choriye Ni ......

1. Kalli Kalli Reejh Main Pugaun Balliye , 
    Dass Tan Sahi Tu Methon Ki Mangdi ,
    Nakhre Da Bhar Tera Chakku Balliye ,
    Dress Main Dawaun Tainu Kaale Rang Di ---2
    Kade Lagdi Kareena Kade Katrina 
    Tere Andar Koi Kami Na ,
    Gall Baat Hor Ae Ni ,
    Tera Kangna Haaye Sangna , 
    Asi Dil Tere To Mangna ,
    Sun Le Goriye Ni ,
    Tera Koka , De Moka ,
    Tenu Dewange Na Dhokha ,
    Dilli Diye Choriye Ni ......

2. Dharti Di Lagdi Na Tu Balliye , 
    Ambran Ton Aayi Koi Pari Lagdi ,
    Mankan Da Munda Tera Time Chakda ,
    Laa Lae Yaari Kehri Gallon Dari Lagdi ---2
    Time Tera Chakda , Na Thakda , 
    Tainu Rehnda Raman Ae Takda ,
    Ohde Layi Sorry Ae Ni ,
    Tera Kangna Haaye Sangna ,
    Asi Dil Tere To Mangna ,
    Sun Le Goriye Ni ,
    Tera Koka , De Moka , 
    Tenu Dewange Na Dhokha ,
    Dilli Diye Choriye Ni ......

snippet.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, January 2021
snippet.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke on a wide range of subjects. PM Modi highlighted India's largest covid vaccination programme and said that it was a symbol of the country's self-reliance. Speaking about road safety, PM Modi said that many efforts were being made for road safety at the individual and collective level. He also condemned the violence that took place on 26th January in Delhi.

snippet.title: Farmers Protest : Deep Sidhu ने जारी किया नया वीडियो,Sunny Deol पर लगाए आरोप | वनइंडिया हिंदी
snippet.description:
A new video has surfaced of Punjabi actor Deep Sidhu, who has come under attack for the violence at the farmers' tractor rally on Republic Day and the waving of a religious flag at the Red Fort. Area MP Sunny Deol has been accused of cheating people. In this video, Deep Sidhu has accused Sunny Deol of cheating people. He has said that Sunny Deol has cheated people.

गणतंत्र दिवस के दिन किसानों की ट्रैक्टर रैली  में हुई हिंसा और लाल किले पर एक धार्मिक ध्वज लहराए जाने को लेकर आरोपों के घेरे में आए पंजाबी एक्टर दीप सिद्धू का एक नया वीडियो सामने आया है।दीप सिद्धू ने फेसबुक लाइव के जरिए अभिनेता और गुरदासपुर लोकसभा क्षेत्र के सांसद सनी देओल पर लोगों को धोखा देने का आरोप लगाया है.इस वीडियो में दीप सिद्धू ने सनी देओल पर लोगों को धोखा देने का आरोप लगाया है. उन्होंने कहा है कि सनी देओल ने लोगों को धोखा दिया है. 

#FarmersProtest #DeepSidhu 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Coimbatore - Avinashi Road | Gandhipuram | Saravanampatti

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Nakkalites presents you a New video "Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal" Annae antha singanallaur bus yenga nae eruku...!!?..🤣🤣

How difficult is it to leave your family and stay to study in another city or state? How does it feel about leaving home for the first time? 

Watch Nakkalites new video “Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal” on Nakkalites Youtube channel.

Nakkalites latest is about a boy who does not want to leave his family and home. But, he has to go to  Singanallaur to build his career.

Find out the challenges the boy faces until he reaches Singanallaur in this Tamil comedy.

Also, watch the full video to see the transformation in the boy.

snippet.title: Drunk N High (Official Video) Mellow D, Aastha Gill | Adah Sharma | Akull | VYRLOriginals | New Song
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you 2021's biggest party anthem - Drunk n High by hitmaker Mellow D & Aastha Gill starring Bollywood actress Adah Sharma for a one of a kind collaboration. The song has been composed by Akull and Mellow D, lyrics have been written by Mellow D and music video is a fun and quirky storyline directed by Robby Singh.

This party banger song is sure to set you in a mood to celebrate and lift your spirits this new year. Watch the video till the end to see @Adah Sharma  in her element ;).

snippet.title: Thoraathe | Varkey | Sooraj Santhosh | Arjun Raj | Ann Jameela Saleem | Karikku Tuned
snippet.description:
#karikku #karikkutuned #musicvideo #varkey

Thoraathe is a tribute to moments collected, impulses seized, the rare second chances
life throws at us. This soulful track evokes an incessant downpour of love, longing and
despair.

Composed, Arranged and Produced by Varkey
Written by Anil Lal
Lead Vocals: Sooraj Santhosh
Additional Vocals: Rony George, Varkey
One-man String quartet: Rithu Vysakh
Guitars and Bass Guitar: Rony George
Additional Guitars: Sujith V.V
Mixing: Finny Kurian
Mastering: Greg Calbi & Steve Fallone at the Sterling Sound, New Jersey

Cast : Arjun Raj, Ann Jameela Saleem
Directed by : Goutham Soorya
Cinematography by : Syamaprakash M.S
Edited by : Malavika VN
Produced by : Arjun Raj Co-produced by : Varkey
Art and Costume Direction by : Caroline Joseph
Asso Director : Gopikrishnan S Kurup
Asso Cinematographer : Sreekesh Chandrabanu
Asso Art & Costume Director : Aparna Kuttikat
Production Controller : Syam Krishnan
Makeup : Naziya Nazer
DI Studio : D Cloud Creations
DI colorist. : Sreedhar V Nair
DI conformist : Manu Madhav
DI line producer : Neeraj Kumar A.S
Costume Courtesy : Linen Trail, L'Zaba
Assi Cinematographer : Gokul Kurup, Midhunsanth M
Production manager - Sivan A
Special thanks: Santhi V, A Varghese, Aswathy Sampath, Nazlin Jameela Saleem, Sandhya S
Kumar, Appu Bhattathiri, Athira Niranjana, Nikhil Prasad, P.S Jayahari, Vivek PIllai, Sreerag.
A Varkey’s Station and Outcast Films Collaboration for Karikku Tuned.

snippet.title: K-Pop band TOMORROW X TOGETHER speaks in HINDI | EXCLUSIVE | ENOW
snippet.description:
Indian MOA! It’s finally here! South-Korean boy band TOMORROW X TOGETHER is all smiles as they talk to Sakshma Srivastav about their love for their Indian fans, their tough lives as public people and becoming a global sensation within two years of debut! The band is under the label Big Hit Entertainment and is the second band to be introduced by the label after BTS (Bangtan Sonyeodan)! The members Soobin, Yeonjun, Beomgyu, Taehyun and Hueningkai are very excited to come to India and meet you all ASAP! Watch this exclusive interview NOW!

localized.description:
Indian MOA! It’s finally here! South-Korean boy band TOMORROW X TOGETHER is all smiles as they talk to Sakshma Srivastav about their love for their Indian fans, their tough lives as public people and becoming a global sensation within two years of debut! The band is under the label Big Hit Entertainment and is the second band to be introduced by the label after BTS (Bangtan Sonyeodan)! The members Soobin, Yeonjun, Beomgyu, Taehyun and Hueningkai are very excited to come to India and meet you all ASAP! Watch this exclusive interview NOW!

snippet.title: My REAL LIFE Ghost Story | The Ranveer Show 92
snippet.description:
✅ Subscribe To Our New Channel "TRS Clips हिंदी" Here: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzdMY6Qsv9CrsNCPgtZlrIw


🎥 Watch Our Podcast Clips (Highlights of our podcast): https://www.youtube.com/c/TheRanveerShowClips

🎧 Listen To #TheRanveerShow On:-

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/episode/3MQ4b7KoDHRiMrz4LVEq2z
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/in/podcast/the-ranveer-show/id1490896085
Google Podcasts: shorturl.at/vFWX0
Simplecast: https://the-ranveer-show.simplecast.com/episodes/my-real-life-ghost-story-the-ranveer-show-92


🎧 Listen To Our Hindi Podcast:-
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9uK6jbdzfVfBzNfitRmYaCXCyq9TaY8q

✅ Subscribe to our HINDI YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/RanveerAllahbadia


Do you believe in ghosts or supernatural beings? In your childhood, these things can scare you, it can terrify you but they are often not true or can they be? 

Sharing the most spine-chilling story that I have never spoken about before. I grew up in a house which was right above my parent’s hospital. Things were never fishy except this one time... what was that incident that shook me and still gives me chills? Listen to this podcast to know the scariest incident of my life.
#horror #scary

About :
BeerBiceps by Ranveer Allahbadia is the ULTIMATE self-improvement & self-help channel. We began as a channel only for fitness & health enthusiasts. Eventually, we started covering topics such as fashion, grooming, personal finance, etiquette, meditation, mental health, communication skills & even entrepreneurship.

Today BeerBiceps is the home for The Ranveer Show or TRS - India's smartest podcast. A show where we host the country's greatest success stories and try digging out their secrets to success. Every conversation on The Ranveer Show is intellectual, deep & informational. We cover everyone from entrepreneurs to Bollywood film stars to even athletes. Every conversation is an EXTREME learning experience for the viewer.

snippet.title: Bigg Boss S14 | बिग बॉस S14 | Devoleena Appreciates Abhinav
snippet.description:
Arshi Khan is not happy with Abhinav Shukla reciting Shayaris for his wife, Rubina Dilaik. However, Devoleena Bhattacharjee begs to differ and says that she enjoys Abhinav's poems. How will Arshi react to Devoleena's statement? Watch this extra masala clip to find out.

snippet.title: Bombay To Barcelona Library Cafe - #SundaysWithShirley | Shirley Setia
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- http://bit.ly/ShirleySetia
Business Inquiries: shirleysetiaofficial@gmail.com

Hey everyone!

Since this series was quite loved on my Instagram, I thought why not introduce it to Youtube this time. For my first of the series here, I visited a cafe with a unique and inspiring story, Bombay to Barcelona Library Cafe in Mumbai. I invited my band members to also join along so we could enjoy some good time and food together. Had come across this cafe online before so thought it would be lovely to check it out in person too! Hope you like it!! 
Do check out the Cafe if you happen to be in Mumbai! 

Let me know in the comments what you'd like to see next on Sundays with Shirley.

Lots of love,
Shirley

Shot by: Rituraj Dharwadkar
Edited by: Shirley Setia


Read more about the Owner of the Cafe: https://www.iambecauseofyou.com/

The Cafe's Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/bombaytobarcelonalibrarycafe/



~~~~~

Instagram: https://instagram.com/shirleysetia
Twitter: https://twitter.com/shirleysetia
Facebook: https://facebook.com/shirleysetia
